message:
🌱 Add dev mode user configuration support

- Add AuthConfig struct for centralized auth configuration
- Support configurable dev user login/email/avatar via env vars
- Fetch real GitHub user info in dev mode if token provided

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
